task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'General Science' selected in a course dropdown menu, sidebar, or displayed in the page header of the OpenSIS interface.
Look for the word 'Projects' entered in an Assignment Type or Category creation field, or selected in a category dropdown menu during assignment creation.

task_completion.description: Enter the assignment title 'Science Fair Project'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Science Fair Project' typed into the assignment title or name input field.
Look for the number '150' entered into a points, max points, or weight input field associated with the assignment.
Look for '2025-06-01' (or '06/01/2025', depending on date format) entered into the due date input field or selected on a calendar widget.
Look for the text 'Final submission for the annual science fair.' typed into a description, details, or notes text area for the assignment.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenSIS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenSIS application, not terminal windows executing SQL or curl commands to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be the OpenSIS web application (look for OpenSIS branding, navigation menus, and standard web forms), not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply paste the task description into a random text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required values (Projects, Science Fair Project, 150, 2025-06-01) must be entered into their respective, specific form fields in the gradebook configuration, not grouped together in a generic text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a gradebook in OpenSIS for the course 'General Science'. Verify that an assignment category named 'Projects' is created. Verify that a new assignment is created with the title 'Science Fair Project', exactly 150 points, a due date of '2025-06-01', and the description 'Final submission for the annual science fair.' All these values must be visible in the appropriate form fields within the OpenSIS web interface.
